items.title: The Sparks trail the Mystics 25-21 after one quarter of play. With Kelsey Plum out, LA is struggling to generate offense, and the defense remains a challenge. Washington is shooting 65% from the field.
items.author: Edwin Garcia
items.body_excerpt: The Sparks trail the Mystics 25-21 after one quarter of play. With Kelsey Plum out, LA is struggling to generate offense, and the defense remains a challenge. Washington is shooting 65% from the field.

items.title: Sparks trail Mystics 25-21 after one. Dearica Hamby paces the Sparks with 5 points. Cameron Brink, Nneka Ogwumike, and Erica Wheeler have 4 apiece. Sparks shot 50%. Shakira Austin leads the Mystics with 7 as Washington shot 65% as a team, 10-for-11 on 2s.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Sparks trail Mystics 25-21 after one. Dearica Hamby paces the Sparks with 5 points. Cameron Brink, Nneka Ogwumike, and Erica Wheeler have 4 apiece. Sparks shot 50%. Shakira Austin leads the Mystics with 7 as Washington shot 65% as a team, 10-for-11 on 2s.

items.title: Dylan Harper is OKC bound for Game 7
items.author: Hoop Informatics
items.body_excerpt:
Dylan Harper is OKC bound for Game 7

Sharing because I assume you, like me, can’t get enough Dylan Harper content

images.alt: Dylan Harper pauses on the jet bridge stairs, backpack slung over one shoulder, arm gripping the rail, his gaze drifting back over the sun-bleached Texas sky above San Antonio. This is the city that made him a Spur. His expression is quiet, unreadable, somewhere between gratitude and resolve. He looks like a man who already knows what he’s going to do. He looks ready to help lead his team to a game seven victory.
